work_context.title: Plan next MCP slow-call optimizations
work_context.planTitle: Reduce the next highest-priority MCP slow-call hotspots after excluding prism_mutate mutate.coordination, starting with prism://plans, prism_concept, and shared compact-tool read paths, then validate the latency improvements with repo-wide call-log evidence.

summary: observed file change: 1 added, 0 removed, 32 updated symbols

changedSymbols.name: Milestone 3: Convert coordination reload and persistence to incremental read/write models
Milestone 3: Convert coordination reload and persistence to incremental read/write models

Eliminate every remaining audited PRISM performance bottleneck by removing full-state refresh and hydration work from hot paths, suffixizing remaining persistence and reload flows, tightening locking boundaries, and validating that no audited hotspot remains on mutate, request, refresh, reload, startup, or background paths.
